Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep the consultation-first process from slipping between email and notes.
  • Track who is a good fit, who is booked, and what prep work is next.
  • Make birth-plan prep feel like part of the workflow instead of a separate document hunt.
